one_time_description: Treaty loans forgiven by Government of Canada including loans administered by BC Treaty Commission
economic_notes: Nation operates hydro-electric power generation (Xeitl Limited Partnership with 25-year electricity purchase agreement with BC Hydro), fisheries (Taku Wild Products Ltd.), and other commercial developments through ATELP. Tlingit Homeland Energy LP undertaking feasibility projects for hydro-electric generation connected to Yukon Territory power grid. Taku Holdings Ltd. manages residential and commercial properties.
notes: Audit is qualified due to incomplete inventory of tangible capital assets — Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 TCA requirements. Treaty loans of $8,147,355 forgiven by Government of Canada is a major one-time item driving the large surplus. Prior year restated to add $1,859,446 in pre-BCTC loans not previously recorded as liabilities. No budget prepared so no budget comparison disclosed. Consolidated entities include 4 subsidiaries (Atlin Tlingit Economic GP Ltd., Atlin Tlingit Economic Limited Partnership, TRTFN Land Holdings Society, Taku Land Corporation) and 6 GBEs/government business partnerships accounted for by modified equity method (Atlin Power Ltd., Taku Wild Products Ltd., Taku Holdings Ltd., Tlingit Homeland Energy Ltd., Tlingit Homeland Energy Limited Partnership, Xeitl Limited Partnership). ATELP Welding Services Limited dissolved during fiscal 2020. OSR calculation includes rental income, modified equity from GBEs, other economic activities, and other grant revenue (non-government grants) minus government transfers.
